sqlMap.select: select * from FirmOfferingScheduleLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmOfferingScheduleLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey DateOffering NameOfInsurer TypesOfOffering TypeOfBusiness IsApplRenderTax DateOfIssIncorp DollarSizeOfOffering Counsel MonthsAsClient AffiliatedWithIssuer IsApplLawyersInvest LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #DateOffering# #NameOfInsurer# #TypesOfOffering# #TypeOfBusiness# #IsApplRenderTax# #DateOfIssIncorp# #DollarSizeOfOffering# #Counsel# #MonthsAsClient# #AffiliatedWithIssuer# #IsApplLawyersInvest# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmOfferingScheduleLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FirmOfferingScheduleKey, DateOffering, NameOfInsurer, TypesOfOffering, TypeOfBusiness, IsApplRenderTax, DateOfIssIncorp, DollarSizeOfOffering, Counsel, MonthsAsClient, AffiliatedWithIssuer, IsApplLawyersInvest, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmOfferingScheduleLW where FirmOfferingScheduleKey = #FirmOfferingScheduleKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmOfferingScheduleLW set
DateOffering = #DateOffering# DateOffering = null NameOfInsurer = #NameOfInsurer# NameOfInsurer = null TypesOfOffering = #TypesOfOffering# TypesOfOffering = null TypeOfBusiness = #TypeOfBusiness# TypeOfBusiness = null IsApplRenderTax = #IsApplRenderTax# IsApplRenderTax = null DateOfIssIncorp = #DateOfIssIncorp# DateOfIssIncorp = null DollarSizeOfOffering = #DollarSizeOfOffering# DollarSizeOfOffering = null Counsel = #Counsel# Counsel = null MonthsAsClient = #MonthsAsClient# MonthsAsClient = null AffiliatedWithIssuer = #AffiliatedWithIssuer# AffiliatedWithIssuer = null IsApplLawyersInvest = #IsApplLawyersInvest# IsApplLawyersInvest = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where FirmOfferingScheduleKey = #FirmOfferingScheduleKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmOfferingScheduleLW where FirmOfferingScheduleKey = #FirmOfferingScheduleKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FirmOfferingScheduleLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirmOfferingScheduleKey, DateOffering, NameOfInsurer, TypesOfOffering, TypeOfBusiness, IsApplRenderTax, DateOfIssIncorp, DollarSizeOfOffering, Counsel, MonthsAsClient, AffiliatedWithIssuer, IsApplLawyersInvest, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmOfferingScheduleLW where FirmOfferingScheduleKey = #FirmOfferingScheduleKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirmOfferingScheduleKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, DateOffering, NameOfInsurer, TypesOfOffering, TypeOfBusiness, IsApplRenderTax, DateOfIssIncorp, DollarSizeOfOffering, Counsel, MonthsAsClient, AffiliatedWithIssuer, IsApplLawyersInvest, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FirmOfferingScheduleLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
